Examples

QHTML Component Examples

This page is now mostly HTML. Each example is a plain <q-editor> with inline QHTML source.

The sidebar is built with document.querySelectorAll(".example-class") and links to each section anchor.

q-keyword syntax usage

Scoped keyword remapping with direct-only alias rules.

q-import { q-components/q-defaults.qhtml } default-color-schema { } default-color-theme { } q-keyword component { q-component } component tiny-card { div.w3-card.w3-padding { q-color { tiny-card-bg tiny-card-fg tiny-card-border } text { Tiny Card } } } tiny-card { }

q-builder.qhtml usage

Always-on builder scoped to the preview container.

q-import { q-components/q-defaults.qhtml } default-color-schema { } default-color-theme { } q-import { q-components/q-modal.qhtml } q-import { q-components/q-builder.qhtml } onReady { var host = this; qbuilder.inspect(host, true); var builder = host.querySelector("q-builder[q-builder-runtime='1']"); host.setAttribute("data-page-edit-mode", "1"); builder.querySelector("q-builder-palette").remove(); } q-builder { id: "page-builder" q-builder-runtime: "1" } div.w3-container.w3-border.w3-round-large.w3-padding.w3-margin-top { h4 { text { Builder Demo } } div.w3-panel.w3-border.w3-round-large.w3-margin-top { q-color { demo-builder-preview-bg demo-builder-preview-fg demo-builder-preview-border } id: "builder-preview-root" h4 { text { Preview Scope } } p { text { q-builder is always enabled in this example. Click here to inspect/edit. } } button.w3-button.w3-small { q-color { demo-builder-action-bg demo-builder-action-fg demo-builder-action-border } type: "button" text { Inner Action } } } }

q-checkout-modal.qhtml usage

Populate checkout items and show the modal.

q-import { q-components/q-defaults.qhtml } default-color-schema { } default-color-theme { } q-import { q-components/q-modal.qhtml } q-import { q-components/q-form.qhtml } q-import { q-components/q-grid.qhtml } q-import { q-components/q-checkout-modal.qhtml?v=cart-fix-3 } button.w3-button { q-color { checkout-open-btn-bg checkout-open-btn-fg checkout-open-btn-border } text { Open Checkout Modal } onclick { var modal = document.querySelector("#checkout-usage"); modal.setItems([ { id: "sku-1", name: "Starter Pack", price: 24.99, quantity: 2 }, { id: "sku-2", name: "Add-on", price: 8.5, quantity: 1 } ]); modal.show(); } } q-checkout-modal { id: "checkout-usage" }

q-estore.qhtml usage

Compose catalog + checkout with autoloaded items.

q-import { q-components/q-defaults.qhtml } default-color-schema { } default-color-theme { } q-import { q-components/q-form.qhtml } q-import { q-components/q-grid.qhtml } q-import { q-components/q-modal.qhtml } q-import { q-components/q-store-catalog-item.qhtml?v=cart-fix-2 } q-import { q-components/q-store-catalog.qhtml?v=cart-fix-2 } q-import { q-components/q-checkout-modal.qhtml?v=cart-fix-3 } q-import { q-components/q-estore.qhtml?v=cart-fix-2 } q-estore { items-json: "[{\"id\":\"sku-1\",\"name\":\"Starter\",\"description\":\"Inline demo item\",\"price\":12.5}]" autoload: "true" }

q-form.qhtml usage

Use form templates for quick input layouts.

q-import { q-components/q-defaults.qhtml } default-color-schema { } default-color-theme { } q-import { q-components/q-form.qhtml } q-form { h3 { text { Quick Form } } q-input { placeholder: "Name" } q-input { type: "email" placeholder: "Email" } q-textarea { text { Tell us what you are building... } } q-submit { text { Send } } }

q-grid.qhtml usage

Create a simple grid with declarative columns.

q-import { q-components/q-defaults.qhtml } default-color-schema { } default-color-theme { } q-import { q-components/q-grid.qhtml } q-grid { columns: 3; div.w3-panel.w3-border { q-color { grid-cell-a-bg grid-cell-fg grid-cell-border } text { Cell A } } div.w3-panel.w3-border { q-color { grid-cell-b-bg grid-cell-fg grid-cell-border } text { Cell B } } div.w3-panel.w3-border { q-color { grid-cell-c-bg grid-cell-fg grid-cell-border } text { Cell C } } }

q-modal.qhtml usage

Open and close modal content via component methods.

q-import { q-components/q-defaults.qhtml } default-color-schema { } default-color-theme { } q-import { q-components/q-modal.qhtml } button.w3-button { q-color { modal-open-btn-bg modal-open-btn-fg modal-open-btn-border } text { Open Modal } onclick { document.querySelector("#modal-usage").show(); } } q-modal { id: "modal-usage" title { h3 { text { q-modal Usage } } } body { p { text { Modal body content from slots. } } } footer { button.w3-button { q-color { modal-close-btn-bg modal-close-btn-fg modal-close-btn-border } text { Close } onclick { this.component.hide(); } } } }

q-sidebar.qhtml usage

Toggle a sidebar panel and slot-based content.

q-import { q-components/q-defaults.qhtml } default-color-schema { } default-color-theme { } q-import { q-components/q-sidebar.qhtml?v=drawer-width } div.w3-container.w3-border.w3-round-large { style { position: relative; height: 240px; overflow: hidden; padding: 8px; } button.w3-button.w3-margin-bottom { q-color { sidebar-toggle-btn-bg sidebar-toggle-btn-fg sidebar-toggle-btn-border } text { Toggle Sidebar } onclick { this.closest("div").querySelector("q-sidebar").toggle(); } } q-sidebar { sidebarWidth: "280" collapsedWidth: "2vw" open: "1" content { div.w3-bar-block.w3-padding.w3-border { q-color { sidebar-content-bg sidebar-content-fg sidebar-content-border } h4 { text { Sidebar } } a.w3-bar-item.w3-button { text { Nav Item 1 } } a.w3-bar-item.w3-button { text { Nav Item 2 } } } } main { div.w3-padding { h4 { text { Main Content } } p { text { q-sidebar uses an in-container grid layout (sidebar + main). } } } } } }

q-store-catalog.qhtml usage

Catalog behavior with add item action.

q-import { q-components/q-defaults.qhtml } default-color-schema { } default-color-theme { } q-import { q-components/q-form.qhtml } q-import { q-components/q-grid.qhtml } q-import { q-components/q-store-catalog-item.qhtml?v=cart-fix-2 } q-import { q-components/q-store-catalog.qhtml?v=cart-fix-2 } button.w3-button.w3-margin-bottom { q-color { catalog-add-btn-bg catalog-add-btn-fg catalog-add-btn-border } text { Add Sample Item } onclick { document.querySelector("#catalog-usage").addCatalogItem({ name: "Demo Item", description: "Added via method", price: 11.25 }); } } q-store-catalog { id: "catalog-usage" }

q-store-catalog-item.qhtml usage

Standalone catalog item card example.

q-import { q-components/q-defaults.qhtml } default-color-schema { } default-color-theme { } q-import { q-components/q-store-catalog-item.qhtml?v=cart-fix-2 } q-store-catalog-item { data-item-id: "widget-a" data-item-name: "Widget A" data-item-description: "Single card usage for store item rendering." data-item-price: "19.95" }

q-popup-menu.qhtml usage

Scoped q-context-menu with item, separator, text, submenu, and click signal.

q-import { q-components/q-defaults.qhtml } default-color-schema { } default-color-theme { } q-import { q-components/q-popup-menu.qhtml } div.w3-container.w3-border.w3-round-large.w3-padding { h4 { text { Right-click inside the dashed area } } div.w3-panel.w3-border-dashed.w3-round-large { q-color { popup-zone-bg popup-zone-fg popup-zone-border } id: "ctx-zone" style { min-height: 140px; } p { text { This context menu is scoped to this panel only. } } q-context-menu { id: "ctx-usage" q-popup-text { text { Actions } } q-popup-separator { } q-popup-item { content { text { Rename } } } q-popup-item { content { text { Duplicate } } } q-popup-submenu { content { text { More } } menu { q-popup-item { content { text { Archive } } } q-popup-item { content { text { Delete } } } } } } } p.w3-small { q-color { popup-log-fg } id: "ctx-log" text { Last click: none } } } onReady { var menu = this.querySelector("#ctx-usage"); var log = this.querySelector("#ctx-log"); menu.addEventListener("menuItemClicked", function(evt) { log.textContent = "Last click: " + String(evt.detail.label || evt.detail.uuid || "unknown"); }); }

q-tabs.qhtml usage

Instantiate tabs and switch via showTab(index).

q-import { q-components/q-defaults.qhtml } default-color-schema { } default-color-theme { } q-import { q-components/q-tabs.qhtml } button.w3-button.w3-margin-bottom { q-color { tabs-show-btn-bg tabs-show-btn-fg tabs-show-btn-border } text { Show Tab 3 } onclick { document.querySelector("#tabs-usage").showTab(2); } } q-tabs { id: "tabs-usage" q-tab { name { text { Overview } } content { p { text { Overview content } } } } q-tab { name { text { Details } } content { p { text { Details content } } } } q-tab { name { text { Logs } } content { p { text { Logs content } } } } }

q-tech-tag.qhtml usage

Placeholder usage for currently empty file.

q-import { q-components/q-defaults.qhtml } default-color-schema { } default-color-theme { } q-import { q-components/q-tech-tag.qhtml } q-tech-tag { text { Extend this tag by adding definitions inside q-tech-tag.qhtml. } } div.w3-panel.w3-small.w3-border { q-color { tech-note-bg tech-note-fg tech-note-border } text { q-tech-tag.qhtml currently has no built-in definitions. } }
